WindCompleted

Xilonghu Valley 60MW Wind Farm

Jizhou District, Tianjin
60MW
2024-06-15

Located in Xilonghu Town, Jizhou District, Tianjin. 60MW capacity with 20 units of 3.0MW wind turbines. Annual generation of 120 million kWh.

SolarCompleted

Maoming Guangdong 50MW Solar Project

Maoming City, Guangdong Province
50MW
2024-05-20

Located in Maoming City, Guangdong Province. 50MW capacity covering 1200 acres with high-efficiency monocrystalline modules.

StorageIn Progress

Ganzi Sichuan 100MW Solar-Storage Project

Ganzi Prefecture, Sichuan Province
100MW + 20MWh
2024-08-01

Located in Ganzi Prefecture, Sichuan Province. 100MW solar + 20MWh storage integrated design.

WindPlanned

Zhangjiakou Hebei 80MW Wind Farm

Zhangjiakou City, Hebei Province
80MW
2024-09-15

Located in Zhangjiakou City, Hebei Province. 80MW capacity, an important clean energy project for the Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei region.

SolarCompleted

Qingdao Shandong 30MW Distributed Solar

Qingdao City, Shandong Province
30MW
2024-07-10

Located in Qingdao City, Shandong Province. 30MW distributed solar on industrial park rooftops.

StorageIn Progress

Inner Mongolia 50MW Energy Storage Station

Inner Mongolia Autonomous Region
50MW/100MWh
2024-10-01

Located in Inner Mongolia. 50MW/100MWh battery energy storage station providing grid peak shaving and frequency regulation.
